typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	ConnectString as string (),
	Dw_Run_Key as integer (),
	Fact_Quey as string (),
	FlatFileConnStr as string (),
	G_Run_Date as integer (),
	G_Run_Eff_DT as timestamp (),
	G_Run_End_DT as timestamp (),
	MailIDFrom as string (),
	MailIDTo as string (),
	MailServer as string (),
	MDBConn as string (),
	PackageName as string (),
	TestFilePath as string ()
}

source(output(
		rowvers as long,
		employeename as string,
		reason as string,
		o_iodate as timestamp,
		iostatus as string,
		dw_fact_key as integer,
		o_iotime as timestamp,
		dw_holder_key as integer,
		dw_gate_key as integer,
		iodatetime as string,
		dw_run_key as integer,
		dw_create_dt as timestamp,
		dw_agg_key as integer,
		validentryflag as integer,
		lastupdate_dt as timestamp,
		cnt as integer,
		basestatus as string,
		leadstatus as string,
		end_iodatetime as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'WITH mylead (dw_fact_key, dw_holder_key, dw_gate_key, iodatetime, iotime, iodate,      iostatus, dw_run_key, dw_create_dt, dw_agg_key, validentryflag,      lastupdate_dt, IsMainGate,rowvers)      AS (SELECT dw_fact_key,                 dw_holder_key,                 d.dw_gate_key,                 ( CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), iodate, 120) + \' \' +                   CONVERT(VARCHAR, iotime, 108) ) AS                 iodatetime,                 iotime,                 iodate,                 iostatus,                 f.dw_run_key,                 f.dw_create_dt,                 dw_agg_key,                 validentryflag,                 f.lastupdate_dt,                 IsMainGate,                 Row_number() OVER(PARTITION BY DW_AGG_KEY ORDER BY (CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),                 iodate, 120) + \' \' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, iotime, 108)) ASC) rowvers          FROM   [Metadata_BI].[dbo].[FACT] f          Inner Join Dim_Gate d          On f.dw_Gate_key = d.Dw_Gate_Key          WHERE  f.dw_run_key = 101                  AND iostatus <> \'Invalid Door\') SELECT rowvers,        employeename,        reason,        b.iodate                            AS o_iodate,        b.iotime                            AS o_iotime,        iodatetime,        end_iodatetime,        b.iostatus,       a.iostatus as basestatus,       a.leadstatus as leadstatus,        dw_fact_key,        a.dw_holder_key,        dw_gate_key,        a.dw_run_key,        a.dw_create_dt,        a.dw_agg_key,        validentryflag,        a.lastupdate_dt,                COUNT(1) OVER(PARTITION BY rowvers) cnt FROM   (SELECT base.dw_fact_key,                           base.dw_holder_key,                           base.dw_gate_key,                           base.iodatetime,                           base.iotime,                           base.iodate,                           base.iostatus,                           lead.iostatus as leadstatus,                           base.dw_run_key,                           base.dw_create_dt,                           base.dw_agg_key,                           base.validentryflag,                           base.lastupdate_dt,                           Coalesce(lead.iodatetime, NULL) AS end_iodatetime,                           base.rowvers                    FROM   mylead base                           LEFT JOIN mylead lead                             ON BASE.DW_RUN_KEY = 101                                                 AND base.dw_holder_key = lead.dw_holder_key                                AND base.dw_agg_key = lead.dw_agg_key                                AND base.rowvers = lead.rowvers - 1                                and BASE.ioSTATUS = LEAD.IOSTATUS                          WHERE base.IsMainGate = 1                          And Lead.IsMainGate = 1                          )a          INNER JOIN dim_holder DH             ON  a.dw_holder_key = DH.DW_HOLDER_KEY                    INNER JOIN oooioentry b             on dh.holder_name = b.employeename                 and (CONVERT (datetime, ( CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), b.iodate, 120) + \' \' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, b.iotime, 108)))>= a.iodatetime)                  AND (CONVERT (datetime,( CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), b.iodate, 120) + \' \' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, b.iotime, 108) ))< a.end_iodatetime)                 and b.reason <>\'Final Exit\'                     inner JOIN agg_fact af          ON af.dw_agg_key = a.dw_agg_key             AND isvalidentry = 1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLESRCFACTOOIOENTRY
OLESRCFACTOOIOENTRY derive(rowvers = rowvers) ~> PlaceHolderSCRINCORRECTDATA
PlaceHolderSCRINCORRECTDATA split(SplitFlag != true(), disjoint: true) ~> CSPLINVALIDFLAG@(ValidEntries,InvalidEntries)
CSPLINVALIDFLAG@ValidEntries derive(SRC = toString($System__PackageName)) ~> DRVSRCCol
DRVSRCCol sink(input(
		{} as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		{} = Param_0)) ~> OLEDSTFACT11
